debug_info.goal:
f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ
F : ℝ → ℝ
a b : ℝ
hab : a < b
ℓ : ℕ → ℝ
hfint : ∀ (n : ℕ), HasIntegral (f n) a b (ℓ n)
hfF : UnifConv f F
RSdiff : ∀ ε > 0, ∃ N, ∀ n ≥ N, ∀ (M : ℕ), |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| < ε
L : ℝ
hL : SeqLim ℓ L
ε : ℝ
hε : ε > 0
N1 N2 : ℕ
N : ℕ := N1 + N2
Nbnd1 : N1 ≤ N
Nbnd2 : N2 ≤ N
hN1 : |ℓ N - L| < ε / 3
Mmax M : ℕ
hM : M ≥ Mmax
hMmax : |(fun N_1 => RiemannSum (f N) a b N_1) M - ℓ N| < ε / 3
hN2 : |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| < ε / 3
⊢ |RiemannSum F a b M - L| ≤ |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N| + |ℓ N - L|

proof:
have h₂ : RiemannSum F a b M - L = (RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N) + (ℓ N - L) := by
    ring
  rw [h₂]
  have h₃ : |(RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N) + (ℓ N - L)| ≤ |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N| + |ℓ N - L| := by
    calc
      |(RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N) + (ℓ N - L)| ≤
          |(RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N)| + |ℓ N - L| := by
        apply le_trans (abs_add _ _)
        <;> simp [abs_sub_comm]
      _ ≤ (|(RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M)| + |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N|) + |ℓ N - L| := by
        apply le_trans (add_le_add_right (abs_add _ _) _)
        <;> simp [abs_sub_comm]
      _ = |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N| + |ℓ N - L| := by
        ring
  calc
    |(RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N) + (ℓ N - L)| ≤
        |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N| + |ℓ N - L| := h₃
    _ = |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N| + |ℓ N - L| := by
      have h₄ : |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M| = |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| := by
        rw [abs_sub_comm]
      rw [h₄]
      <;> simp [add_assoc]
  <;> simp [abs_sub_comm]
  <;> ring_nf
  <;> norm_num
  <;> linarith
  <;> simp_all [abs_sub_comm]
  <;> linarith
  <;> norm_num
  <;> linarith

have h1 : RiemannSum F a b M - L = (RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N) + (ℓ N - L) := by ring

      _ ≤ |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N| + |ℓ N - L| := by
        -- Apply the triangle inequality to the sum of three terms
        calc
          |(RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N) + (ℓ N - L)| =
              |(RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N) + (ℓ N - L)| := by rfl

have h₁ : |RiemannSum F a b M - L| ≤ |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |(ℓ N - L) + (RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N)| := by
    calc
      |RiemannSum F a b M - L| = |(RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f N) a b M - L)| := by
        ring_nf
        <;> simp [abs_sub_comm]
        <;> ring_nf
      _ ≤ |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - L| := by
        apply abs_add
      _ = |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - L| := by
        rw [abs_sub_comm]
        <;> ring_nf
      _ ≤ |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |(ℓ N - L) + (RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N)| := by
        have h₂ : |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - L| ≤ |(ℓ N - L) + (RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N)| := by
          calc
            |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - L| = |(RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N) + (ℓ N - L)| := by ring_nf
            _ ≤ |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N| + |ℓ N - L| := by apply abs_add
            _ ≤ |(ℓ N - L) + (RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N)| := by
              -- Use the fact that for any real numbers x and y, |x + y| ≥ |x| - |y|
              -- Here, we can set x = (ℓ N - L) and y = (RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N)
              -- But we need to find a relationship that allows us to compare the expressions.
              -- Instead, we can directly use the reverse triangle inequality to get:
              -- |(ℓ N - L) + (RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N)| ≥ ||ℓ N - L| - |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N||
              -- However, we need an upper bound, not a lower bound. So we need a different approach.
              -- Notice that |(ℓ N - L) + (RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N)| = |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - L|
              -- Therefore, we actually have:
              -- |(ℓ N - L) + (RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N)| = |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - L|
              -- And we need to prove that |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - L| ≤ |(ℓ N - L) + (RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N)|
              -- But this is trivially true because both sides are equal.
              have h₃ : (ℓ N - L) + (RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N) = RiemannSum (f N) a b M - L := by ring
              rw [h₃]
              <;> simp [abs_sub_comm]
        have h₃ : 0 ≤ |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| := abs_nonneg _
        linarith
  have h₂ : |(ℓ N - L) + (RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N)| ≤ |ℓ N - L| + |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N| := by
    -- Using the triangle inequality to bound the absolute value of the sum by the sum of absolute values.
    calc
      |(ℓ N - L) + (RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N)| ≤ |ℓ N - L| + |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N| := by
        -- Apply the triangle inequality to the sum of (ℓ N - L) and (RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N)
        apply abs_add
      _ = |ℓ N - L| + |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N| := by rfl
  have h₃ : |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |(ℓ N - L) + (RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N)| ≤ |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + (|ℓ N - L| + |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N|) := by
    linarith
  calc
    |RiemannSum F a b M - L| ≤ |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |(ℓ N - L) + (RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N)| := by
      exact h₁

    ring
  rw [h₂]
  have h₃ : |(RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N) + (ℓ N - L)| ≤ |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N| + |ℓ N - L| := by
    calc
      |(RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N) + (ℓ N - L)| ≤
          |(RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N)| + |ℓ N - L| := by
        apply le_trans (abs_add _ _)
        <;> simp [abs_sub_comm]
      _ ≤ (|(RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M)| + |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N|) + |ℓ N - L| := by
        apply le_trans (add_le_add_right (abs_add _ _) _)
        <;> simp [abs_sub_comm]
      _ = |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N| + |ℓ N - L| := by
        ring
  calc
    |(RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N) + (ℓ N - L)| ≤
        |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N| + |ℓ N - L| := h₃
    _ = |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N| + |ℓ N - L| := by
      have h₄ : |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M| = |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| := by
        rw [abs_sub_comm]
      rw [h₄]
      <;> simp [add_assoc]
  <;> simp [abs_sub_comm]
  <;> ring_nf
  <;> norm_num
  <;> linarith
  <;> simp_all [abs_sub_comm]
  <;> linarith
  <;> norm_num
  <;> linarith

have h1 : |RiemannSum F a b M - L| ≤ |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - L| := by
    calc
      |RiemannSum F a b M - L| = |(RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M) + (RiemannSum (f N) a b M - L)| := by ring_nf
      _ ≤ |RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f N) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - L| := by
        apply abs_add
      _ = |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - L| := by
        rw [abs_sub_comm (RiemannSum (f N) a b M) (RiemannSum F a b M)]
  have h2 : |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - L| ≤ |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N| + |ℓ N - L| := by
    calc
      |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - L| = |(RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N) + (ℓ N - L)| := by ring_nf
      _ ≤ |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N| + |ℓ N - L| := by
        apply abs_add
  calc
    |RiemannSum F a b M - L| ≤ |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - L| := h1
    _ ≤ |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + (|RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N| + |ℓ N - L|) := by
      gcongr <;> linarith
    _ = |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f N) a b M - ℓ N| + |ℓ N - L| := by
      ring
